title: Storage Load
description: Retrieve a stored value from AsyncStorage on component mount and update the local state.
problemStatement:
Retrieve data! Use `useEffect` to call `AsyncStorage.getItem('@my_key')` and update a state `savedVal` with the result.

**Requirement:** Handle the null case if the key doesn't exist yet.
hints: Interaction with device storage is always asynchronous, so use `.then()` or `await`.
expectedOutput: Stored data displayed on the screen when the app opens
